author: Haroen Viaene
subject: test(server): retry unit tests (algolia/react-instantsearch#3475)
body:
* test(server): retry module tests

These tests are flaky, as sometimes Jest chooses to cache the modules accross tests, even if they shouldn't be. isolatedModules or resetModules could help, but then react doesn't work anymore https://github.com/facebook/jest/issues/8987

* larger retries?

* retry with circle?

* try in bash

* try this format

* try this?

* retry in both
